name: rd-flywheel
description: Turn new engineering work into production-proven reusable capability.

interface.shortDescription: 将新工作验证为可复用生产能力
interface.longDescription: Use real first practices and visual decision gates to take new requirements, projects, and engineering tasks through production evidence, capability-gap construction, rollback validation, and experience harvest.
defaultPrompt: 把这个新需求作为研发飞轮首个实践
用可视化门禁确认这个新项目的设计
补齐缺失能力并恢复原研发任务
